input_roles.main_reference_image: Provides the scene identity, spatial skeleton, architectural grammar, materials and style.
input_roles.supporting_reference_images: Only supplement local material, lighting, structure or layout; never override the main reference or upstream design facts.

layout.sheet_intent: spatial proof board for one coherent scene, not nine separate concept shots
layout.grid: strict 3x3 with uniform gutters and clean panel divisions

identity_badge.fallback: preserve a clean top-left badge plate for post-production overlay; do not hallucinate long text

panel_label_policy.fallback: reserve a clean lower-left label strip in every panel

view_plan.purpose: wide atmosphere view establishing full spatial envelope and dominant light
medium function view showing zoning and narrative center
ritual, architectural or material close-up proving culture and material logic
entrance, threshold, barrier or passage relationship
structure, support, scale, joins and spatial hierarchy
low-angle view proving vertical axis, oppression or transcendence
circulation, ritual path, service route or spatial linkage
material, cultural threshold, ornament or era-coded detail
high-angle or top-down spatial order view

critical_requirements: Use reference images and desc as the source of truth; do not redesign the scene.
Every panel must depict the same coherent scene with stable orientation, light direction, materials and landmarks.
No people, human shadows, creatures or silhouettes unless explicitly required by the user.
Top-left identity badge must show <scene_short_id> or preserve a clean overlay-ready badge plate.
Every panel must have a lower-left scene-view label or a clean overlay-ready label strip.
negative_constraints: no people, no human shadows, no creatures
no flipped orientation or material drift
no missing identity badge or panel label area

prompt_assembly.final_prompt_template: Create one SCENE_DESIGN_SHEET for <scene_name> (<scene_short_id>) using <desc> and the reference images. Apply the subject_invariant_lock, strict 3x3 spatial proof layout, top-left identity badge, and lower-left panel labels for every view. Preserve one coherent scene identity across all panels.

review_focus: same scene identity across all panels
consistent orientation, light direction and materials
top-left short ID badge or overlay-ready badge plate
lower-left panel labels or overlay-ready label strips
